title: pacemaker bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 8.
description:
[2.1.7-5.5.0.1]
- Upstream reference in pacemaker crm_report binary [Orabug: 32825154]
- Replace bug url [Orabug: 34202300]

[2.1.7-5.5]
- Don't overwhelm the FSA queue with repeated CIB queries
- Related: RHEL-76276

[2.1.7-5.4]
- Be more lenient in evicting IPC clients
- Resolves: RHEL-76276
full_text:
[2.1.7-5.5.0.1]
- Upstream reference in pacemaker crm_report binary [Orabug: 32825154]
- Replace bug url [Orabug: 34202300]

[2.1.7-5.5]
- Don't overwhelm the FSA queue with repeated CIB queries
- Related: RHEL-76276

[2.1.7-5.4]
- Be more lenient in evicting IPC clients
- Resolves: RHEL-76276

References:
https://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELBA-2025-23369.html
